Bash(curl -s "https://connectors.windsor.ai/instagram?api_key=5f70fa33c11293d29e7688db8eb93ab0048a&fields=date,account_id,account_name,reach,impressions,followers_count,profile_views,follows_count&date_preset=last_7d" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']
# Find a row and print all keys + values
print\('Keys:', list\(data[0].keys\(\)\) if data else 'no data'\)
# Print first 3 rows
for row in data[:3]:
    print\(row\)
" 2>&1)

import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']
for row in data[:3]:
    non_null = {k: v for k, v in row.items\(\) if v is not None}
    print\(non_null\)
